zh.Newbury, Berkshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭波克夏紐波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Bennett於1499年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas Bennett29歲，母親Elizabeth Gill25歲。她於1514年與Sir Thomas Sheppey在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1546年在英國賀福爾享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bennett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the medieval personal name Benedict , from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. In the 12th century the Latin form of the name is found in England alongside versions derived from the Old French form Beneit, Benoit, which was common among the Normans. The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Bernhard  .
Altered form of French Benet or Bennet or of some other similar (like-sounding) French surname. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

variants.name: Bennetts
meanings: English (Cornwall): variant of Bennett , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Dittus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Fritz, Kurt, Otto, Reinhold.
German: from a vernacular short form of the Latin personal name Benedictus (see Bennett ).

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: from the personal name Benedict, from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. This owed its popularity in the Middle Ages chiefly to Saint Benedict of Norcia (c. 480–550), who founded the Benedictine order of monks at Monte Cassino and wrote a monastic rule that formed a model for all subsequent rules. No doubt the meaning of the Latin word also contributed to its popularity as a personal name, especially in Romance countries. Occasionally the English surname may derive from Latin benedicite ‘bless (you)’, perhaps given as a nickname to an habitual user of the expression. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed the German variant Benedikt and many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Benedek , Slovenian Benedik (see Benedick ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Italian Benedetti .

variants.name: Bennight
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Bennett  .

variants.name: Bennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Bene(i)t + -son. See Bennett and compare Benson .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Bennett was born in 1499, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Bennett, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth Gill, was 25. She married Sir Thomas Sheppey in 1514, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1546, in Herefordshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Bennett est née en 1499, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Bennett, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Gill, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Sheppey en 1514, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1546, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Bennett 1499 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Bennett 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Gill 25. Sie hat 1514 in Herefordshire, England Sir Thomas Sheppey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1546 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Bennett è nata il nel 1499 nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Bennett, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Gill, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Sheppey nel 1514, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1546, nel Herefordshire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Bennett(이)가 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Bennett(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Gill(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1514년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Sir Thomas Sheppey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1546년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Bennett родилась в 1499 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Bennett было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gill, 25. Она умерла в 1546 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Sheppey en 1514, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1546, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
